body_txt: Even though it hurts, pain can be funny . Butts can also be funny . So combining the two is hilarious! This trope is pretty straightforward. A character receives some sort of trauma to their backside. This trope often appears in slapstick or otherwise humorous context. This is because, in addition to the fact that butts, particularly large ones, are often seen as inherently humorous, butts are naturally padded, so if something or someone strikes one, there's less likely to be any serious injury involved. This tends to happen to plumper characters more often, since their butts are naturally bigger targets. It also frequently happens to the Butt-Monkey , presumably hence the name. A Super-Trope to:  Sub-Trope of Joke of the Butt and Amusing Injuries . Compare Attack the Tail (where the target is even further beyond the rear end), contrast Butt Sticker and Ass Kicks You (where it's the butt that hurts someone else), and see also Flirtatious Smack on the Ass (where it's not meant to be painful so much as sexy).
